diagrams.title: ER-to-Relational Mapping Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the complete mapping process from ER model to relational schema

diagrams.title: 1:1, 1:N, M:N Relationship Mapping
diagrams.description: Three approaches for mapping different relationship cardinalities
elements: 1:1: Foreign Key in either entity OR merge OR junction table
1:N: Foreign key in N-side entity referencing 1-side
M:N: New relation with composite primary key from foreign keys

diagrams.title: Weak Entity Mapping
diagrams.description: Shows how weak entity depends on owner for identification
elements: Weak Entity with attributes plus owner PK as FK

diagrams.title: Specialization/Generalization Mapping
diagrams.description: Three strategies for mapping ISA hierarchies
elements: Strategy 1: Single table with type attribute
Strategy 2: Separate tables for superclass and subclasses
Strategy 3: Only subclass tables with all attributes
Comparison of approaches based on constraints
